channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jürgen Klopp to take on new role as head of global soccer at Red Bull
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Former Liverpool coach Jürgen Klopp is returning to soccer after a shorter than expected break. Energy drinks manufacturer Red Bull announced Wednesday that the German mentor is to become its head of global soccer from January, overseeing its international network of clubs.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Robert Saleh breaks silence after Jets firing
item.description: Former New York Jets head coach Robert Saleh broke his silence on Wednesday after he was fired by the team five games into the 2024 season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kirk Cousins joined the 500-yard club but couldn't top Norm Van Brocklin's 73-year-old record
item.description: Inside the Numbers dives into NFL statistics, streaks and trends each week. For more Inside the Numbers, head here.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers coach Kyle Shanahan explains why he was 'pretty shocked' Jets fired Robert Saleh
item.description: San Francisco 49ers head coach Kyle Shanahan said he was "pretty shocked" to see the New York Jets fired Robert Saleh, who was his defensive coordinator prior to this job.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mark Cuban defends NBA's China partnership despite opposing 'Chinese and all human rights violations'
item.description: Dallas Mavericks minority owner Mark Cuban doubled down on his public approval for the NBA's partnership with China after previously defending and embracing it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Heisman frontrunner Ashton Jeanty compared to future Hall of Fame running back by NFL greats: 'The real deal'
item.description: Mark Ingram II, a Heisman Trophy winner, has been very impressed with Boise State's Ashton Jeanty, while Anthony "Spice" Adams sees Frank Gore whenever he watches him play.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lynx return to finals with 88-77 win over Sun in Game 5 behind Collier's 27 points, 11 rebounds
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Lynx are three wins from a fifth championship, chasing a league record with an entirely different core from the previous dynasty. Napheesa Collier is fully in charge of this group.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tatis homers again as the Padres beat the Dodgers 6-5 for a 2-1 NLDS lead
item.description: Fernando Tatis Jr.‘s towering two-run home run highlighted a six-run second inning, and the San Diego Padres held on to beat Shohei Ohtani and the rival Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 to take a 2-1 lead in a tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Bernie Wilson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Phillies one defeat from elimination after 7-2 loss to Mets in Game 3 of NLDS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six months of success for the Philadelphia Phillies could be wiped out before the leaves start to turn. With one more loss to the New York Mets, a 95-win regular season would become an afterthought.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lindor relishes his 1st home game in a month as Mets trounce Phillies for 2-1 lead in NLDS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Francisco Lindor waited a month to get back in the lineup at Citi Field. When he finally did Tuesday, was it everything he envisioned? “It was better,” Lindor said, flashing that signature smile. “Pretty cool. Pretty special." Playing at home for the first time since Sept.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mets beat Phillies 7-2 behind Alonso and Manaea to take 2-1 lead in NLDS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pete Alonso launched another homer off Aaron Nola, and Sean Manaea took a two-hit shutout into the eighth inning as the New York Mets beat the Philadelphia Phillies 7-2 on Tuesday in Game 3 of their NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Night vision view from helicopter gives wild perspective of viral Vanderbilt celebration with goalpost
item.description: The party was on in Nashville after unranked Vanderbilt defeated No. 1 Alabama on Saturday night, and night vision from a helicopter above caught it all.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Perez's homer off Rodón sparks 4-run 4th inning and Royals beat Yankees 4-2 in Game 2 to tie ALDS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Salvador Perez homered leading off the fourth inning to spark a four-run rally against Carlos Rodón, and the Kansas City Royals beat the New York Yankees 4-2 on Monday night to even their AL Division Series at one game apiece.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Taylor Swift is back to watch Travis Kelce and the Chiefs with Eras Tour soon to resume
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Taylor Swift was back at Arrowhead Stadium on Monday night to see her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the Kansas City Chiefs play the New Orleans Saints after the pop superstar had missed the team's previous two games on the road.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: PHOTOS: Padres look to rebound in game 2 of NLDS against Dodgers
item.description: Photos: The San Diego Padres are facing off against the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 2 of the NL Division Series on Sunday, with Yu Darvish starting for the Padres.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Ohtani homers in playoff debut and the Dodgers rally to beat the Padres 7-5 in NLDS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani hit a three-run homer in his postseason debut, Teoscar Hernández’s two-run single gave Los Angeles its first lead in a playoff game in two years, and the Dodgers beat the San Diego Padres 7-5 in their NL Division Series opener Saturday.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: PHOTOS: Padres and Dodgers face off in game 1 of the NLDS
item.description: The San Diego Padres are continuing their postseason journey in game one of the NLDS against the Dodgers after defeating the Braves earlier this week in the NL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Lane Thomas hits 3-run homer, Cleveland's bullpen torments Tigers as Guardians win ALDS opener 7-0
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lane Thomas hit a three-run homer in a five-run outburst before Detroit got an out, and the Cleveland Guardians unleashed their lights-out bullpen to complete a four-hitter in a 7-0 win over the Tigers in an AL Division Series opener on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers' Kershaw, Guardians' Lively, Tigers' Mize and Yankees' Stroman are left off ALDS rosters
item.description: Pitchers Clayton Kershaw and Joe Kelly were left off the Los Angeles Dodgers' roster for their NL Division Series against the San Diego Padres that started Saturday. San Diego added right-handers Martín Pérez and Alek Jacob, who were skipped from the Wild Card Series roster against Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ludmila scores in third straight game as Chicago Red Stars down Houston Dash 2-0
item.description: Ludmila scored a goal and earned a penalty shot as the Chicago Red Stars beat the Houston Dash 2-0 on Friday night at Shell Energy Stadium. Ludmila headed in Mallory Pugh's free kick in the 8th minute to get things started. It was the third straight game she had scored a goal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers issue statement on Fernando Valenzuela's status
item.description: Dodgers broadcaster and former player Fernando Valenzuela has been hospitalized and will miss the playoffs this year, but the team is hopeful he will return for next season.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5
